rows.label: tlk70000153_10_msg0001
rows.name:
By my feathers, who knew there were
warriors strong enough to defeat the
unspeakably strong Golden Monsters?!

rows.label: tlk70000153_10_msg0002
rows.name:
I knew you weren't just some ordinary
schmoes from the moment you broke my
seal, but this is something else...

rows.label: tlk70000153_10_msg0003
rows.name:
Well, I may not spend eternity
with that priceless treasure,
but this isn't all bad either.

rows.label: tlk70000153_10_msg0004
rows.name:
Because thanks to you, I got
to meet strong warriors
like yourselves!

rows.label: tlk70000153_10_msg0005
rows.name:
[ML:Feeling kind=Think ] And because you bought my frankly
unspeakable intel for a pretty penny,
and without even trying to haggle...

rows.label: tlk70000153_10_msg0006
rows.name:
I have nothing more to sell you,
but if you wish to see my treasures,
come whenever you like!
